title: Frontend Engineer Profile
content: Frontend engineer with 6+ years in React, TypeScript and product delivery across APAC teams.

title: Senior Frontend Engineer - Fintech Platform
content: Led migration from legacy SPA to React + TypeScript, reducing release regression defects by 42% over two quarters.

title: Platform Collaboration
content: Partnered with backend and product managers to deliver REST API integrations and analytics instrumentation.

title: Design System Rollout
content: Built reusable component library with Storybook and accessibility checks, adopted by 4 product squads.

title: Performance Optimization
content: Improved web vitals by code splitting and rendering optimization, reducing p95 page load from 4.8s to 2.1s.

title: Core Frontend Stack
content: React, TypeScript, Next.js, Testing Library, Playwright

title: Release Stability
content: Introduced CI quality gates and reduced hotfix incidents by 37%.

title: Security and Compliance Support
content: Worked with security team on OAuth flows and audit logging requirements for regulated customers.

title: Experimentation Framework
content: Implemented A/B test framework and event taxonomy for conversion experiments.

title: Cloud and DevOps
content: AWS, GitHub Actions, Docker, observability tooling

title: Mentoring Impact
content: Mentored 3 junior engineers who were promoted within 12 months.
